data.name: NoSuchCollection
data.value: Collection '{name}' does not exist.

data.name: UnsupportedObjectType
data.value: Object type {typeName} is not supported by {host}.

data.name: UnknownEnumeration
data.value: The value for enumeration type {typeName} is not valid.

data.name: InvalidArgument
data.value: '{arg}' is invalid.

data.name: ObjectCannotBeCreated
data.value: {obj} cannot be created.

data.name: TooManyURNsReturned
data.value: Multiple URNs were returned for root condition {typeName}.

data.name: RootConditionFailed
data.value: Root condition {typeName} failed to retrieve the object.

data.name: UnsupportedConnectionType
data.value: Connection type '{typeName}' is not supported. Use a SqlStoreConnection or ServerConnection object instead.

data.name: Policy
data.value: Policy

data.name: Condition
data.value: Condition

data.name: ObjectSet
data.value: Object Set

data.name: Category
data.value: Category

data.name: RootCondition
data.value: Server Condition

data.name: EvaluationMode
data.value: Evaluation Mode

data.name: Schedule
data.value: Schedule

data.name: Enabled
data.value: Enabled

data.name: TargetSet
data.value: Target Set

data.name: ManagementFacet
data.value: Management Facet

data.name: Property
data.value: Property

data.name: ObjectType
data.value: Object type

data.name: PolicyStore
data.value: Policy Store

data.name: CategorySubscription
data.value: Category Subscription

data.name: NotSupported
data.value: {host_type} '{host_name}' does not support {object_type} '{object_name}'.

data.name: ObjectAlreadyExists
data.value: {objectName} '{name}' already exists.

data.name: ObjectDoesntExist
data.value: {objectName} '{name}' does not exist.

data.name: ArgumentNullOrEmpty
data.value: {argument} cannot be Null or Empty.

data.name: FailedOperation
data.value: {opName} failed for {objType} '{objName}'.

data.name: ConsistencyRepair
data.value: Consistency Repair

data.name: EraseSystemHealthPhantomRecords
data.value: Erasing the phantom records from the system_health_state table

data.name: ValuePositive
data.value: Value must be greater than or equal to zero.

data.name: PurgeHealthState
data.value: Delete health state

data.name: MarkSystemObject
data.value: Mark system object

data.name: CannotMarkSystemObject
data.value: Cannot mark '{objType}' object as System.

data.name: DefaultCategory
data.value: <Default>

data.name: EvaluationModeNoneDescription
data.value: On demand

data.name: EvaluationModeEnforceDescription
data.value: On change: prevent

data.name: EvaluationModeCoCDescription
data.value: On change: log only

data.name: EvaluationModeCoSDescription
data.value: On schedule

data.name: AdditionalHelpText
data.value: Additional help text

data.name: AdditionalHelpLink
data.value: Additional help link

data.name: CheckMode
data.value: Check Mode

data.name: ConfigureMode
data.value: Configure Mode

data.name: CheckSqlScriptAsProxyMode
data.value: Check Sql Script As Proxy

data.name: AdapterAlreadyExists
data.value: Adapter for this interface and object pair already exists ({interfaceName}, {objectName}).

data.name: AdapterHasTooManyArguments
data.value: Adapter {name} has a constructor that has more than one argument

data.name: AssemblyAlreadyRegistered
data.value: Assembly {name} is already registered.

data.name: FailedMethodCall
data.value: Method call {methodName} failed for facet type {facetType} over target type {targetName}.

data.name: ConfigValueMismatch
data.value: Value of property {propertyName} is not in a committed state. Configuration value = {configValue}, Run value = {runValue}. Before policies can evaluate this property, you must restart the service.

data.name: OperatorNotApplicable
data.value: Operator {operatorName} is not a supported comparison operator for type {typeName}.

data.name: FunctionWrongArgumentsNumber
data.value: Function {function} received {argsReceived} arguments. The expected number of arguments is {argsExpected}.

data.name: FunctionWrongArgumentType
data.value: Function {function} received an argument of type {typeReceived}. The expected type is {typeExpected}.

data.name: ExpressionTypeMistmatch
data.value: Type {typeLeft} cannot be compared to {typeRight}.

data.name: NullFacet
data.value: Cannot find Facet associated with {facet}.

data.name: BadExpressionTree
data.value: ExpressionTree is not formed correctly. ({reason})

data.name: EvaluatingOperatorNone
data.value: Operator of type NONE cannot be evaluated.

data.name: ExpressionNodeNotConfigurableGeneric
data.value: Expression cannot be configured.

data.name: ExpressionNodeNotConfigurable
data.value: Cannot configure the target. The result is not deterministic because of operator [{subtype}].

data.name: ExpressionNodeNotConfigurableOperators
data.value: Cannot configure property [{propertyName}] to conform to expression [{expression}] because the result is not deterministic.

data.name: UnsupportedTargetFilter
data.value: Target filter '{filter}' is not supported because it does not point out to one single database.

data.name: ParsingError
data.value: Error parsing '{input}'. Make sure string constants are enclosed in single quotes and facet properties are prefixed with '@' sign.

data.name: ParsingArgumentException
data.value: Parsing '{pattern}' - {message}.

data.name: ParsingUnclosedBracketMsg
data.value: Unterminated [] set

data.name: ParsingUnclosedParenthesisMsg
data.value: Unterminated () set

data.name: ParsingMissingQuotes
data.value: Missing quotation marks

data.name: ParsingMissingElement
data.value: Missing list element

data.name: ParsingSyntaxError
data.value: Syntax error

data.name: ParsingUnquotedDatePart
data.value: Error parsing '{input}'. Policy expressions require the first argument of DATEADD and DATEPART functions to be in single quotes. For example, use "DATEADD('DAY', -7, GETDATE())".

data.name: UnsupportedFunction
data.value: Function '{typeName}' is not supported in filters on this edition of SQL Server.

data.name: InvalidOperand
data.value: Type '{typeName}' cannot be {operand}.

data.name: LeftOperand
data.value: left operand

data.name: RightOperand
data.value: right operand

data.name: NonConfigurableReadOnlyProperty
data.value: Cannot change property [{propertyName}] because it is read-only.

data.name: InvalidInOperator
data.value: Operator '{operatorName}' must have a value as its left operand and its right operand must be an Array.

data.name: InvalidList
data.value: All items in the list must have the same type.

data.name: FunctionWrongReturnType
data.value: Function {function} specified a return value of type {typeReceived}. The expected type is {typeExpected}.

data.name: FunctionNotASmoObject
data.value: Function {functionName} attempted with bad target type {targetType}.

data.name: FunctionTooManyColumns
data.value: Query for scalar function returns more than one column.

data.name: WmiException
data.value: An error has occurred while accessing WMI: {message}.

data.name: CannotProduceScript
data.value: Cannot produce configuration script from given object.

data.name: NoConfigureScriptForCompliantObject
data.value: Object complies with the policy.

data.name: PropertyCannotBeSet
data.value: Property '{prop}' cannot be Set.

data.name: CannotMoveToElement
data.value: Cannot find the next element.

data.name: UnexpectedElement
data.value: Element name '{nameRead}' is unexpected. Expected the name '{nameExpected}'.

data.name: UnexpectedType
data.value: Unexpected xml-node type '{typeRead}', name '{nameRead}'. Expected type '{typeExpected}'.

data.name: UnexpectedName
data.value: Unexpected xml-node type '{typeRead}', name '{nameRead}'. Expected type '{typeExpected}', name '{nameExpected}'.

data.name: CannotConvertToType
data.value: String '{inputString}' cannot be converted to type '{typeName}'.

data.name: UnsupportedConstantType
data.value: {node} does not support type '{typeName}'.

data.name: UnknownPolicy
data.value: <unknown policy>

data.name: InvalidOrMissingXMLReader
data.value: Invalid or missing XML stream to read from.

data.name: SinglePolicyDeserializationFailed
data.value: Single policy deserialization from an XML stream failed.

data.name: PolicyImportFileDoesNotHaveAnyPolicy
data.value: Single policy deseralization failed. No policy was found in the given file.

data.name: SinglePolicyExpected
data.value: Policy '{policyName}' is unexpected. The policy '{policyName2}' was already found and a single policy is expected.

data.name: ReferencedObjectExpected
data.value: {objectType} '{objectName}' is unexpected. This object should be referenced directly by the Policy or by the Object Set.

data.name: PolicyAndConditionNameMismatch
data.value: The condition '{conditionName}' is a mismatch. The policy '{policyName}' references the condition '{policyCondition}'.

data.name: ObjectSetAndConditionFacetMismatch
data.value: Facets mismatch. The Object Set '{objectSetName}' references the Management Facet '{objectSetFacet}'. The Condition '{conditionName}' references the Management Facet '{conditionFacet}'.

data.name: ConditionIsNull
data.value: The policy cannot be evaluated because it does not contain a condition.

data.name: ObjectSetIsNull
data.value: Policy not associated with active Object Set cannot be evaluated in this mode.

data.name: IncompatiblePolicyEvaluationMode
data.value: The policy cannot be evaluated in the given context.

data.name: OnlyOneConditionExpression
data.value: The policy cannot be evaluated because it does not contain at least one condition expression.

data.name: OnlyOneTarget
data.value: The QueryExpression '{queryExpression}' should describe one valid target for this method to succeed.

data.name: OnlyInSqlClr
data.value: This method can be called only inside SQLCLR.

data.name: MissingPolicy
data.value: Policy '{name}' does not exist.

data.name: MissingProperty
data.value: Property '{name}' does not exist.

data.name: NonRetrievableProperty
data.value: Property value '{name}' is not available.

data.name: RollBack
data.value: Policy '{policy}' has been violated by '{objectQe}'. This transaction will be rolled back. Policy condition: '{condition}' Policy description: '{description}' Additional help: '{helpText}' : '{helpLink}' Statement: '{statement}'.

data.name: OnlyInMsdb
data.value: The procedure can be executed only in the msdb database.

data.name: OnlyRoleMember
data.value: Only members of the '{role}' role can execute this procedure.

data.name: PolicyEvaluationFailed
data.value: Exception encountered while executing policy '{policyName}'.

data.name: PolicyEvaluationFailedOnDelegate
data.value: Exception encountered in callback while evaluating policy '{policyName}'.

data.name: PolicyEvaluationFailedNoException
data.value: Exception encountered while evaluating policy '{policyName}'. Cannot log exception details because exception serialization failed.

data.name: NullArgInPolicyEvaluation
data.value: The policy evaluation procedure cannot be called with null arguments.

data.name: BadEventData
data.value: Malformed event data. The value for element '{element}' is wrong. Event body: '{eventName}'.

data.name: MissingTypeFacetAssociation
data.value: There is no association between type '{typeName}' and facet '{facet}'.

data.name: NoScriptInSqlClr
data.value: The policy '{policy}' will not be evaluated because it references a condition whose evaluation includes executing T-SQL or WQL scripts.

data.name: PolicyViolated
data.value: Policy '{policy}' has been violated.

data.name: PolicyViolatedTarget
data.value: Policy '{policy}' has been violated by target '{targetName}'.

data.name: FailedToRetrieveImpersonationCookie
data.value: Failed to retrieve impersonation cookie.

data.name: CantExecuteLongSqlScriptOn2000
data.value: Cannot evaluate an ExecSql() expression with a script size greater than 4000 characters on a SQL Server 2000 target.

data.name: PolicyCategoryAlreadySubscribed
data.value: The target '{0}' is already subscribed to the Policy Category '{1}'.

data.name: PolicyCategoryNotSubscribed
data.value: The target '{0}' is not subscribed to the Policy Category '{1}'.

data.name: Function
data.value: Function

data.name: Operator
data.value: Operator

data.name: ConversionNotSupported
data.value: {obj} '{typeName}' is not supported by Target Set.

data.name: TypeNotSupported
data.value: Type '{typeName}' cannot be converted to a filter node.

data.name: PolicyWithNoFilters
data.value: An automated Policy must have an active Object Set defined.

data.name: ScheduleDoesntExist
data.value: Schedule with provided ScheduleUid '{guid}' doesn't exist.

data.name: ValidationFailed
data.value: Validation failed for {objectType} '{objectName}'.

data.name: MissingJobSchedule
data.value: CheckOnSchedule requires a Schedule. Select an existing Schedule, create a new Schedule, or change the Execution mode.

data.name: StringPropertyTooLong
data.value: String property '{propertyName}' accepts a maximum of {maxLength} characters. {currentLength} characters were provided.

data.name: InvalidHelpLinkMessage
data.value: Invalid help link. Help link must start with http://, https:// or mailto:.

data.name: ReferencedConditionsCannotContainScript
data.value: Conditions referenced by automated policies cannot contain script.

data.name: FacetNotSupported
data.value: Non-system policies/conditions on Utility facets are not supported in [KJ].

data.name: UnknownTargetDatabase
data.value: The policy '{policy}' has listed database '{name}' as a target but this database does not exist.

data.name: UnsupportedTqe
data.value: Target query expression '{queryEx}' is not currently supported because it points to non-SMO objects.

data.name: UnsupportedKey
data.value: Cannot create key for object of type '{key}'. It is not a DMF object.

data.name: UnsupportedTqeProp
data.value: Target query expression '{queryEx}' is not currently supported because it attempts to filter on {prop}.

data.name: EnumApplicablePolicies
data.value: Enumerate applicable policies

data.name: CalculateHealthState
data.value: Calculate health state

data.name: GetAggregatedHealthState
data.value: Get aggregated health state

data.name: UnsupportedCrudDependencyAction
data.value: '{action}' is not a supported CRUD dependency action.

data.name: InvalidUrnSkeleton
data.value: Invalid Urn Skeleton '{action}'.

data.name: TargetSetCountMismatch
data.value: The Object Set '{objectSetName}' has an invalid number of Target Sets was specified for Facet '{facetName}'.

data.name: UnsupportedTargetSetForFacet
data.value: The Object Set '{objectSetName}' has an unsupported Target Set '{targetSetSkeleton}' specified for Facet '{facetName}'.

data.name: NoTargetSetEnabled
data.value: At least one Target Set needs to be enabled for the Object Set '{objectSetName}'.

data.name: ConditionCannotBeUsedForFiltering
data.value: Condition '{condition}' cannot be used for filtering.

data.name: CannotChangeFacet
data.value: Changing Facet is not allowed for referenced Conditions.

data.name: CannotChangeFacetForObjectSet
data.value: Changing Facet is not allowed for ObjectSet. Drop and create a new one.

data.name: ObjectSetAlreadyReferenced
data.value: Object Set '{objectSetName}' is already referenced by Policy '{policyName}'. Only one Policy can reference an Object Set.

data.name: VersionNotSupported
data.value: Connected version '{curVerison}' doesn't support this method. The minimal version for this method is '{minVersion}'.
